title: Product Catalog

frontmatter.title: Product Catalog
frontmatter.description: The certifiable competency of authoring, validating, and operating commercial offerings — TMF620 product catalog and TMF658 loyalty — as the monetization layer of the telco stack.

body:
# Skill · Product Catalog

A commercial competency: the agent can author and validate a **TMF620 Product Catalog**, operate a
**TMF658 Loyalty** program, and reason about how offerings, pricing, and earn/burn mechanics drive
monetization.

## Conferred by
- [COMM-210](../schools/customer-commercial/departments/product-catalog/courses/comm-210.md)
- [COMM-220](../schools/customer-commercial/departments/loyalty/courses/comm-220.md)

## Examined by
[Customer & Commercial Exam](../benchmarks/comm-exam.md).

## Maps to certification
Required for [Customer & Commercial — Silver](../certifications/customer-commercial-silver.md).
Mirrors the `commandCorrectness` and `anticipatedImpact` dimensions of the agun.ai
`EvaluationScores` as applied to catalog and loyalty operations.
